metadata.description: Example RAGAS dataset format - use this as a template for creating custom test sets

test_cases.question: What is the exact formula for calculating the RTi parameter in patent EP 2 390 376?
test_cases.ground_truth: RTi = [Ti] / (4 × ([C] + [N])), where [Ti], [C], and [N] are contents in mass%.

test_cases.question: Which patent describes using rare earth elements to control titanium precipitation, and what is the mechanism?
test_cases.ground_truth: EP 1 816 226 describes using REM (rare earth metals) to fix titanium as TiN by coprecipitation on REM oxysulfide surfaces.

test_cases.question: Compare the approaches to high-strength electrical steel in patents EP 2 390 376 and EP 2 679 695.
test_cases.ground_truth: EP 2 390 376 uses high Ti content (0.1-0.3%) for precipitation and solid solution strengthening. EP 2 679 695 uses low Ti content (≤0.04%) for controlled fine carbide precipitation. The key difference is ~10x Ti content and different strengthening mechanisms.
